metadata.context:
Phase B-D from gcp-phase-b-d-cold-start.xml COMPLETE. BF16 auto-detect DONE. T4 banned. Remaining: rebuild Docker image, rerun VesselFM + sam3_hybrid on L4, AMP isolation, cost estimator, mlruns sync.
GCP smoke test results (2026-03-15): sam3_vanilla: FINISHED, val_loss=0.632 (T4 me-west1) dynunet: FINISHED, val_loss=0.749 (T4 me-west1) sam3_hybrid: FINISHED, val_loss=NaN (T4 me-west1 — FP16 overflow, pre-BF16 fix) vesselfm: FAILED, shape error (T4 me-west1 — stale Docker image, missing Z=32)

phase.name: Rebuild Docker Image + Rerun Failed Models
phase.description: Root cause of VesselFM failure: GAR Docker image (built 00:31 UTC) predates PR #723 merge (06:10 UTC) which added VesselFM patch_size=(64,64,32). sam3_hybrid NaN was caused by T4 (Turing, no BF16). Both fixes are now in main. Rebuild image and rerun.

task.name: Rebuild Docker base image with latest main
task.description: Build minivess-base:latest from current main (includes BF16 auto-detect + VesselFM Z=32 patch fix + atomic checkpoints + NaN guards). Push to GAR (europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess/base:latest).
task.acceptance: GAR image updated with timestamp AFTER latest main merge. Verify: gcloud artifacts docker images list ... shows new CREATE_TIME.

task.name: Rerun VesselFM on GCP L4 spot
task.description: Launch VesselFM smoke test on GCP L4 (NOT T4). New Docker image has Z=32 patch fix. Expected: training completes, val_loss finite.

commands.cmd: uv run python scripts/launch_smoke_test.py --model vesselfm --cloud gcp

task.acceptance: VesselFM training completes without shape error. val_loss is finite in MLflow.

task.name: Rerun sam3_hybrid on GCP L4 spot (BF16)
task.description: Launch sam3_hybrid on GCP L4 (Ada Lovelace, BF16 supported). New Docker image has BF16 auto-detect. Expected: encoder uses bfloat16, val_loss finite. This is the critical verification that BF16 fixes the NaN.

commands.cmd: uv run python scripts/launch_smoke_test.py --model sam3_hybrid --cloud gcp

task.acceptance: sam3_hybrid training completes with finite val_loss. MLflow shows sys_encoder_dtype or log message confirming BF16. NaN guard does NOT fire (no overflow with BF16).

phase.name: AMP Isolation — Conditional
phase.description: If sam3_hybrid STILL produces NaN with BF16 on L4, the root cause is AMP autocast + 3D operations (MONAI #4243), not FP16 overflow. Test with AMP disabled.

task.name: Run sam3_hybrid with AMP OFF on L4
task.description: Use smoke_sam3_hybrid_cloud.yaml (mixed_precision: false) on L4. If finite → AMP is the problem. Implement separate train/val AMP policy. If NaN → something else entirely. Escalate.
task.acceptance: Root cause confirmed: BF16 alone sufficient OR AMP policy needed.

phase.name: Dynamic GPU Cost Estimator
phase.description: Build epoch-0 cost prediction into infrastructure_timing.py (issue #717). After first epoch completes, extrapolate total job cost and log to MLflow. LIBRARY-FIRST: extends existing compute_cost_analysis() in infrastructure_timing.py.

tdd-spec.red: test_predict_cost: 22 min/epoch × 5 epochs × $0.19/hr = $0.35 test_predict_with_folds: 22 min × 5 epochs × 3 folds × $0.19/hr = $1.05 test_predict_zero_local: no cost for local runs test_actual_vs_predicted: actual cost at end uses real elapsed time
tdd-spec.green: estimate_cost_from_first_epoch(epoch_seconds, max_epochs, num_folds, hourly_rate) Hook into trainer.py after epoch 0.

phase.name: RunPod/GCP → Local mlruns Sync
phase.description: Sync cloud MLflow artifacts to local for analysis (issue #716). For GCP: use gsutil rsync from GCS bucket. For RunPod: use sky cluster ssh + rsync.

tdd-spec.red: test_gcs_sync_command: gsutil -m rsync -r gs://bucket/mlruns ./mlruns test_runpod_sync_command: sky rsync cluster:/mlruns ./mlruns test_excludes_checkpoints: exclude *.pth, *.onnx by default test_dry_run: --dry-run flag
tdd-spec.green: CloudSyncer class with sync(provider, source, dest, dry_run). GCS path: gsutil rsync. RunPod: sky rsync.

phase.name: Final 4-Model GCP Verification
phase.description: Run all 4 models on GCP L4 spot with rebuilt Docker image. Verify: all models produce finite val_loss, BF16 active for SAM3, VesselFM uses Z=32 patches, atomic checkpoints + SHA256 sidecars written. Sequential launches (GCP GPU quota = 1).

task.name: Sequential 4-model smoke test on L4
task.acceptance: All 4 models: FINISHED status in MLflow with finite val_loss. sam3_hybrid: BF16 confirmed (no NaN guard warnings in logs). vesselfm: no shape error (Z=32 patch used).

cost-summary.item: Docker rebuild (local) + 2 reruns on L4 (~10 min each)

execution-notes.note: ALREADY DONE: BF16 auto-detect (2da7460), T4 ban, atomic checkpoints, SHA256
BLOCKING: Docker image rebuild required before ANY cloud rerun
GCP GPU quota = 1: models must run sequentially, not in parallel
Use ralph-loop for autonomous monitoring of cloud phases
All cloud execution uses Docker images via image_id: — no bare VM
L4 is default GCP GPU ($0.19/hr spot, Ada Lovelace, BF16 support)
